summary: The presence of HLA-B27 is highly indicative and considered specific for ankylosing spondylitis. Other conditions may share symptoms or complications similar to those seen in AS, making them less definitive markers solely for this disease. \boxed{\text{Specific marker}}

Other conditions may share symptoms or complications similar to those seen in AS, making them less definitive markers solely for this disease. \boxed{\text{Specific marker}}. Answer choice: B
